idea-plugin.name: Data Preprocessor
idea-plugin.description:
Stop writing repetitive pandas preprocessing scripts.

Data Preprocessor is an in-IDE toolkit for cleaning, transforming, and preparing datasets directly inside your JetBrains IDE.

Load a CSV, Excel (.xlsx), or JSON file, profile your data instantly, handle missing values, remove duplicates and outliers, normalize columns, and generate ready-to-run Python (pandas) code from your workflow. Pro unlocks R and SQL generation, reusable pipelines, column visualisations, custom regex rules, and batch processing — all without leaving the IDE.

Key features:
  • Column Profiling & Statistics — type, null count, unique count, mean, median, std dev, min, max, mode
  • Missing Value Handling — drop rows or fill with mean, median, mode, or a custom value
  • Duplicate Removal — detect and remove duplicate rows in one click
  • Outlier Detection (IQR) — identify and remove outliers using the IQR fence method
  • Data Normalization — Min-Max scaling [0, 1], Z-Score standardisation (mean=0, std=1), or Robust Scaler (median/IQR)
  • Column Type Casting — cast any column to int, float, boolean, or string
  • Label Encoding — encode categorical columns to integer indices
  • One-Hot Encoding — expand categorical columns into binary dummy columns
  • Train / Test Split — split the dataset with a configurable ratio; reflected in generated Python and Pro R code
  • Sort Column — sort the dataset ascending or descending by any column (numeric or text)
  • Filter Rows — keep only rows matching a condition (==, !=, >, <, >=, <=, contains)
  • Regex Replace [Pro] — clean text columns with custom regex find/replace rules, including capture-group replacements
  • Reusable Pipelines [Pro] — import/export cleaning pipelines as `.dpp` JSON files
  • Multi-File Batch Mode [Pro] — apply the current pipeline to many CSV, Excel, or JSON files and export cleaned CSV copies
  • Python Code Generation — one click produces a complete, ready-to-run pandas script
  • R Code Generation [Pro] — one click produces an equivalent base-R script; readxl / jsonlite / fastDummies imported only when needed
  • SQL Code Generation [Pro] — one click produces a PostgreSQL-style CTE template for database-side preprocessing
  • Undo / Redo — step back and forward through pipeline edits without losing work
  • Export cleaned CSV — choose where to save the transformed dataset via a file dialog
  • Copy cleaned data as TSV — paste applied results directly into Excel or Google Sheets
  • Column Visualisations [Pro] — histogram and box plot per numeric column rendered inside the tool window; charts update automatically after Apply
  • Settings — configure preview row limit, default normalization method, and default train/test ratio

Built for data scientists, analysts, and developers who want faster preprocessing without leaving their IDE.

Compatible with IntelliJ IDEA, PyCharm, DataGrip, and other JetBrains IDEs.


Privacy: This plugin does not collect, store, or transmit any user data. All processing is performed locally within the IDE.

action.description: Load this data file into the Data Preprocessor tool window
Insert generated pandas preprocessing code at the caret
Open the Data Preprocessor tool window
